Aaron Williams

Aaron Williams

(A-Train)

Position: Power Forward and Center ▪ Shoots: Left

6-9, 220lb (206cm, 99kg)

Born: October 2, 1971 (Age: 54-284d) in Evanston, Illinois us

College: Xavier

High School: Rolling Meadows in Rolling Meadows, Illinois

NBA Debut: November 30, 1993

Career Length: 14 years

0.0%

Transactions

November 29, 1993: Signed as a free agent with the Utah Jazz.

December 27, 1993: Waived by the Utah Jazz.

October 6, 1994: Signed as a free agent with the Milwaukee Bucks.

November 7, 1994: Waived by the Milwaukee Bucks.

November 9, 1994: Signed as a free agent with the Milwaukee Bucks.

March 22, 1995: Waived by the Milwaukee Bucks.

December 22, 1996: Signed as a free agent with the Denver Nuggets.

January 6, 1997: Waived by the Denver Nuggets.

January 29, 1997: Signed the first of two 10-day contracts with the Vancouver Grizzlies.

February 20, 1997: Signed a contract for the rest of the season with the Vancouver Grizzlies.

August 11, 1997: Signed as a free agent with the Seattle SuperSonics.

August 17, 1999: Signed as a free agent with the Washington Wizards.

August 5, 2000: Signed as a free agent with the New Jersey Nets.

December 17, 2004: Traded by the New Jersey Nets with Alonzo Mourning, Eric Williams, a 2005 1st round draft pick (Joey Graham was later selected) and a 2006 1st round draft pick (Renaldo Balkman was later selected) to the Toronto Raptors for Vince Carter.

January 31, 2006: Traded by the Toronto Raptors to the New Orleans/Oklahoma City Hornets for a 2006 2nd round draft pick (Edin Bavčić was later selected) and a 2009 2nd round draft pick (Jack McClinton was later selected).

August 1, 2006: Signed as a free agent with the Los Angeles Clippers.

March 28, 2008: Waived by the Los Angeles Clippers.

Frequently Asked Questions

How old is Aaron Williams?

Aaron Williams is 54 years old.

Where was Aaron Williams born?

Aaron Williams was born in Evanston, Illinois.

When was Aaron Williams born?

Aaron Williams was born on October 2, 1971.

How tall is Aaron Williams?

Aaron Williams is 6-9 (206 cm) tall.

How much did Aaron Williams weigh when playing?

Aaron Williams weighed 220 lbs (99 kg) when playing.

Is Aaron Williams in the Hall of Fame?

Aaron Williams is not in the Hall of Fame.

What position did Aaron Williams play?

Power Forward and Center.

When did Aaron Williams retire?

Aaron Williams last played in 2008.

What is Aaron Williams' net worth?

Aaron Williams made at least $23,649,257 playing professional basketball.

How much did Aaron Williams make?

Aaron Williams made $3,790,257 in 2005.

What did Aaron Williams average?

Aaron Williams averaged 5.8 points, 3.9 rebounds, and 0.7 assists per game.

How many rings does Aaron Williams have?

Aaron Williams won 0 championships.

What schools did Aaron Williams attend?

Aaron Williams attended Rolling Meadows in Rolling Meadows, Illinois and Xavier.

What are Aaron Williams' nicknames?

A-Train is a nickname for Aaron Williams.
